channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Top 10 JAMB 2026 Candidates and Their Scores
item.description: JAMB don release di list of di top 10 candidates wey perform well pass for di 2026 UTME. Di number one candidate na Owoeye Daniella Jesudunsin wey score 372 out of 400 and she dey apply for Medicine a...

item.title: Uganda’s President Museveni sworn in for seventh term after 40 years in office
item.description: Uganda don witness history again as President Yoweri Museveni don swear in for him seventh term, continuing him rule wey don dey for over 40 years. At 81 years old, Museveni carry the ceremonial symbo...

item.title: African Leaders Call for Investment and Equal Global Partnerships Over Aid
item.description: During the Africa Forward Summit held in Nairobi, President William Ruto of Kenya emphasised that African countries are done with one-sided aid arrangements and now seek genuine investment and equal p...

item.title: Rep. Norma Torres Presses HUD Secretary Scott Turner on California Fire Relief Funding
item.description: During a House Appropriations subcommittee hearing on May 12, 2026, Rep. Norma Torres (D-CA) confronted Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Scott Turner over delays in disaster relief funding f...

item.title: Sam Altman Testifies About Tense Negotiations with Elon Musk Over OpenAI's Future
item.description: During a high-profile trial in Oakland, California, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman testified about his uneasy interactions with Elon Musk in 2017 regarding the company’s proposed for-profit arm. Altman said he...

item.title: Addressing Structural Inequality to Protect Black and Indigenous Youth from Gang Exploitation
item.description: Across northern Ontario, Black and Indigenous youth are increasingly drawn into gangs and drug trafficking networks, often as young as 14. Experts argue that this is not a matter of personal choice or...

item.title: Labour MPs Question Starmer’s Leadership Amid Internal Party Unrest
item.description: Labour leader Keir Starmer is facing growing pressure from within his own party, with more than 80 MPs, including several ministers, publicly urging him to resign. While some Labour MPs plot against p...

item.title: Tanzania Plans USD 89M ICT Budget to Expand Digital Infrastructure and Support Startups in 2026/27
item.description: Tanzania's Ministry of Communications and Information Technology has tabled a budget of TZS 222.6 billion (around USD 89 million) for the 2026/27 financial year. Most of this, about 94.1%, will go to ...

item.title: LRMC partners with Mister Loo to improve LRT-1 station restrooms
item.description: The Light Rail Manila Corporation (LRMC) is set to enhance the restroom facilities across LRT-1 stations following its new collaboration with Mister Loo Philippines. The project aims to provide commut...

item.title: Orlando Pirates close to winning Betway Premiership after Sundowns defeat
item.description: Orlando Pirates are on the verge of winning the Betway Premiership for the first time in 14 years, needing just one win from their last two matches. This comes after Mamelodi Sundowns suffered a 3-2 d...

item.title: KWS Tracks Hyena Spotted in Syokimau Near JKIA
item.description: Residents in Syokimau, near Jomo Kenyatta International Airport (JKIA), have been advised to stay calm but alert following reports of a hyena sighting along Mwananchi Road. The Kenya Wildlife Service ...

item.title: Woman reported missing after obtaining passport from DFA
item.description: A woman who recently processed her passport at the Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) has been reported missing for more than a week. Local authorities and concerned relatives are currently coordinat...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi raises concerns over transparency in CBI chief appointment process
item.description: New Delhi: Rahul Gandhi, the Leader of Opposition in Lok Sabha, has formally registered his dissent regarding the selection process for the next Director of the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI). ...

item.title: Emma Willis begins therapy as she prepares to host Strictly Come Dancing
item.description: Emma Willis, the well-known British television presenter, has revealed that she has begun therapy after struggling to manage her mental health issues for several years. Speaking candidly to her husban...

item.title: Labor forecasts higher migration amid Coalition and One Nation calls for lower numbers
item.description: The Albanese government now anticipates an additional 35,000 migrants staying in Australia this financial year, raising net overseas migration estimates from 260,000 to 295,000. Despite forecasts for ...

item.title: Montreal-Minnesota PWHL Game 5 Postponed for Health Precautions, No New Illnesses Reported
item.description: The deciding Game 5 of the PWHL semifinal between the Montreal Victoire and Minnesota Frost was postponed on Monday evening due to player safety concerns related to illness. The game, initially schedu...

item.title: Profile of Nollywood actor Alexx Ekubo
item.description: The article presents a profile of Alexx Ekubo, a Nigerian actor, model, entertainer and humanitarian who has become one of Nollywood’s notable screen personalities. It positions him as a familiar face...

item.title: Assessing New Zealand Citizenship: Limitations of a Multiple-Choice Test
item.description: New Zealand plans to introduce a citizenship test in late 2027, requiring aspiring citizens to achieve at least 75% in a 20-question multiple-choice exam. Minister of Internal Affairs Brooke Van Velde...

item.title: Orlando Pirates Close in on Premiership Title After Sundowns Shocked by TS Galaxy
item.description: In a thrilling twist in the 2025-26 Betway Premiership season, Orlando Pirates are poised to end Mamelodi Sundowns’ eight-year title dominance. Sundowns, who have been the powerhouse of South African ...

item.title: Yanga finalises plans for new stadium construction with GSM
item.description: Young Africans, one of Tanzania’s top football clubs, is moving forward with a major stadium project after a final high-level meeting at their headquarters today, May 12, 2026. The meeting gathered to...
